final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical instructional illustration showing how to deploy hermes inside a docker container and integrate glmcodingplan, with clearly labeled step-by-step panels.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical-diagram / infographic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a vertical multi-panel layout with 4 clearly numbered steps (1 → 2 → 3 → 4) arranged top to bottom
Subject: must include all 4 deployment steps:
  Step 1: docker 环境准备 / 拉取 hermes 镜像
  Step 2: 启动 docker 容器并配置 hermes
  Step 3: 接入 glmcodingplan（API 配置 / 连接）
  Step 4: 验证部署成功 / 运行测试
Scene/backdrop: must include a dark terminal / IDE-style background per panel, with code snippets and command-line visuals
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a dark-mode tech direction — exact accent colors and contrast ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1" "2" "3" "4" (large, bold, per panel), "hermes" and "glmcodingplan" as verbatim identifiers in relevant panels, representative docker CLI commands (e.g. docker pull, docker run) as code-block annotations
Constraints: must preserve the 4-step sequential flow with visible numbered markers; each panel must be visually distinct and self-contained; arrows or connectors between steps required
Avoid:
